name: x-search
description: Codex plugin for searching recent public X posts through a local-only MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Use a local-only MCP server to search recent public X posts with credentials resolved from 1Password references or local bootstrap paths. No raw X secrets are stored in Codex plugin files.
defaultPrompt: Search X for recent posts about a topic
Find the latest discussion around a company
Pull recent posts matching a research query
